allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/def xpath\(doc, ""\), do: \\[\\]/def xpath\(_doc, ""\), do: []/' lib/eoo/xml.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' '82s/.*/  def cells\(%__MODULE__{} = sheet\), do: sheet/' lib/eoo/excelx/sheet.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [{:xmlElement, name, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, children, nil, nil, nil}], else: acc/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [elem], else: acc/' lib/eoo/excelx/relationships.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, children, _, _, _}, tag, acc\) do/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, children, _, _, _} = elem, tag, acc\) do/' lib/eoo/excelx/relationships.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, children, _, _, _}, tag, acc\) do/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _} = elem, tag, acc\) do/' lib/eoo/excelx/images.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [{:xmlElement, name, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, children, nil, nil, nil}], else: acc/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [elem], else: acc/' lib/eoo/excelx/images.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, children, _, _, _}, tag, acc\) do/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _} = elem, tag, acc\) do/' lib/eoo/excelx/shared_strings.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [{:xmlElement, name, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, children, nil, nil, nil}], else: acc/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [elem], else: acc/' lib/eoo/excelx/shared_strings.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, children, _, _, _}, tag, acc\) do/defp do_find\({:xmlElement, name, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _} = elem, tag, acc\) do/' lib/eoo/excelx/sheet_doc.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [{:xmlElement, name, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, nil, children, nil, nil, nil}], else: acc/acc = if to_string\(name\) == tag, do: acc ++ [elem], else: acc/' lib/eoo/excelx/sheet_doc.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/Enum.reduce\({str_v, new_comments}, fn child, {sv, cm} ->/Enum.reduce\({str_v, new_comments}, fn child, {sv, cm} ->/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/{sv2, cm2} = extract_cell_content/{str_v, new_comments} = extract_cell_content/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/Map.put\(:first_rows, %{ods.first_rows |> Map.put\(sheet => first_row}\)/Map.put\(:first_rows, Map.put\(ods.first_rows, sheet, first_row\)\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/Map.put\(:last_rows, %{ods.last_rows |> Map.put\(sheet => last_row}\)/Map.put\(:last_rows, Map.put\(ods.last_rows, sheet, last_row\)\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/Map.put\(:first_cols, %{ods.first_cols |> Map.put\(sheet => first_col || 1}\)/Map.put\(:first_cols, Map.put\(ods.first_cols, sheet, first_col || 1\)\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/Map.put\(:last_cols, %{ods.last_cols |> Map.put\(sheet => last_col || 1}\)/Map.put\(:last_cols, Map.put\(ods.last_cols, sheet, last_col || 1\)\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/|> Map.put\(:first_rows, Map.put\(ods.first_rows, sheet, first_row\)\)/|> then\(fn s -> %{s | first_rows: Map.put\(s.first_rows, sheet, first_row\)} end\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/|> Map.put\(:last_rows, Map.put\(ods.last_rows, sheet, last_row\)\)/|> then\(fn s -> %{s | last_rows: Map.put\(s.last_rows, sheet, last_row\)} end\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/|> Map.put\(:first_cols, Map.put\(ods.first_cols, sheet, first_col || 1\)\)/|> then\(fn s -> %{s | first_cols: Map.put\(s.first_cols, sheet, first_col || 1\)} end\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/|> Map.put\(:last_cols, Map.put\(ods.last_cols, sheet, last_col || 1\)\)/|> then\(fn s -> %{s | last_cols: Map.put\(s.last_cols, sheet, last_col || 1\)} end\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/    {new_cells, new_types, new_formulas, new_styles, new_comments, col, col + col_advance - 1}/    {new_cells, new_types, new_formulas, new_styles, new_comments, col + col_advance}/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/process_ods_cell\(cell, sheet, row_num, cc, cct, cf, cst, ccm, cfc, clc\)/process_ods_cell\(cell, sheet, row_num, cc, cct, cf, cst, ccm, cfc, clc\)/' lib/eoo/open_office.ex)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/            {new_c, new_ct, new_f, new_st, new_cm, new_fc, new_lc} = *)
